description_long: This object is a modern tactical shotgun with a matte black finish and a compact, robust design. It features a prominent optical sight mounted on the top rail, enhancing its targeting capabilities for urban environments. The shotgun has a tubular magazine running parallel beneath the barrel, and the barrel itself is relatively short, suitable for close-quarters use. The stock is a pistol grip style, providing ergonomic handling and control, and the trigger guard is large and rounded for easy access. Red accents are visible on the magazine or grip area, adding a distinct visual contrast. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components for weight reduction and durability.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, optical sight, and pistol grip stock, featuring red accents and a robust, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, optical sight, pistol grip, and red accent on the magazine or grip.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the optical sight, rail system, and the narrow profile of the barrel and magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shotgun's compact build, optical sight, and the red accent on the grip area.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the tubular magazine beneath the barrel and the overall slimness of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and ample space for finger access
